narrative:
Liberty Twp 24 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,440 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.8 percentage points.
